plugins.name: browzer
plugins.description: Hybrid vector + Graph RAG search across indexed codebases and document workspaces, powered by the browzer CLI. Twenty-one skills covering install/auth, workspace + doc ingestion, code + markdown search, dependency graph, async ingestion polling, workspace management, an end-to-end idea-to-merge dev workflow (generate-prd → generate-task → execute-task → update-docs → commit → sync-workspace) with four auto-injected quality phases (brainstorming step-0 preflight, test-driven-development, write-tests with mutation-resistant test design, verification-before-completion with blast-radius + mutation testing), and an orchestrate-task-delivery meta-skill that routes the whole pipeline.
